seoTitle: How to Add a Credit Card to QuickBooks Online
metaDescription: Learn how to add a credit card account to QuickBooks Online so your card transactions can be tracked, categorized, and reconciled properly.
intro: Adding your business credit card to QuickBooks Online is the first step toward getting all your transactions tracked automatically. This guide covers how to set up the card account correctly.

steps.heading: Go to the chart of accounts
steps.body: Navigate to your chart of accounts to add a new credit card account.

steps.heading: Add a new credit card account
steps.body: Select credit card as the account type and give it a clear name matching the card you're adding.

steps.heading: Connect the card to your bank feed
steps.body: Link the account to your card issuer through the bank feed connection so transactions import automatically.

steps.heading: Review the imported transactions
steps.body: Check the first batch of imported transactions to confirm they're coming through correctly.

faq.question: Do I need to connect the card to a bank feed?
faq.answer: You can add the account without connecting a feed, but connecting it saves time by automatically importing transactions.

faq.question: Can I add more than one credit card?
faq.answer: Yes, you can add as many credit card accounts as your business uses.

faq.question: What if my card issuer isn't listed for a direct connection?
faq.answer: You can still add the account manually and enter or upload transactions without an automatic feed.

faq.question: How do I record the starting balance for a new card?
faq.answer: You'll typically enter the opening balance as of the date you start tracking the card in QuickBooks Online.
